tagline: Building high-performance full-stack systems, NLP intelligence, and cloud architectures.
description: Full-stack developer specializing in Natural Language Processing, AWS, Python, and C++ Data Structures.

roles.detailed: Full-Stack Engineer · NLP Architect · Cloud Developer

bio: I am a Full Stack Developer and NLP enthusiast pursuing my B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering at Presidency University (Class of 2028). I specialize in building end-to-end web applications, developing Natural Language Processing solutions, and architecting cloud systems with AWS. With solid foundations in Data Structures & Algorithms using C++, and backend integration using Python, Firebase, and MySQL, I build scalable digital solutions that are both high-performing and user-centric.

bullets: Pursuing a Bachelor of Technology in CSE, focusing on algorithm design, software engineering practices, and cloud technologies.
Mastering Data Structures and Algorithms in C++ to write high-performance, efficient code.
Collaborating on student projects and participating in programming workshops and hackathons.
experience.desc: Studying Computer Science and Engineering. Deep-diving into C++ Data Structures, Databases (MySQL), and modern web stacks.

bullets: Architecting full-stack web applications featuring secure token authentication and relational databases.
Developing text-processing pipelines using Python and Natural Language Processing (NLP) toolkits.
Deploying services on Amazon Web Services (AWS), utilizing EC2, Lambda, and cloud monitoring tools.
experience.desc: Building open-source developer tools, serverless architectures, and text intelligence systems using Python, Next.js, and cloud platforms.

projects.title: NexusNLP
projects.subtitle: Advanced Text Analytics & Sentiment Orchestrator
projects.desc: A high-performance text intelligence platform. Orchestrates custom NLP pipelines including multi-lingual entity recognition, sentiment scoring, and text summarization. Built with a FastAPI backend running serverless on AWS Lambda, using Firebase for authentication and a real-time dashboard.

projects.title: CloudData Sync
projects.subtitle: Real-Time Multi-Engine Database Bridge
projects.desc: A high-throughput database synchronization pipeline that mirrors MySQL relational data to Firebase's NoSQL real-time document store. Features a core synchronization worker optimized with a C++ parsing module for binary logs, keeping sync latency under 12ms.

publications.title: Mastering Data Structures in C++: Algorithmic Efficiency for Modern Apps
publications.desc: A comprehensive deep dive into leveraging pointer architectures and memory management in C++ to design highly efficient computational data structures.

publications.title: Deploying Serverless NLP Models on AWS: A Step-by-Step Guide
publications.desc: A walkthrough of deploying containerized Python text-processing engines to AWS Lambda, optimizing memory footprints, and reducing cold-start times.

publications.title: Real-Time Sync Pipelines: Bridge MySQL with Firebase Realtime Database
publications.desc: Explaining the architecture behind binary log parsing in MySQL and streaming change data captures into Firebase NoSQL documents.
